overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a snowy alpine landscape. The character traverses rocky mountain terrain and descends into forested valleys with snow-covered peaks visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail along rocky cliff face

events.description: character begins turning left to follow the winding mountain path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the narrow snowy path with swords strapped to his back, hugging the rock wall

entered.detail: tall snow-capped mountain peak dominating the forward view
steep gray rock face with patches of snow running alongside the path
uneven terrain covered in snow and scattered rocks
sparse evergreen trees on the distant left slope

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a narrow snowy mountain trail pressed against a steep rock wall. The path winds toward a prominent snow-covered peak visible ahead, with scattered pine trees dotting the distant left mountainside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with panoramic peak views

events.description: path opens up from narrow cliffside to wide valley view with distant mountain ranges
character continues descending leftward into the valley basin

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns left and descends into the valley, revealing expansive views of the surrounding mountain ranges

entered.detail: layered snow-covered mountains visible across the valley
light fog settling in the lower valley areas
group of tall pine trees marking the forest edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open valley vista as Geralt descends leftward. The rocky cliff falls behind while distant mountain ranges come into view across the misty valley, with clusters of pine trees appearing on the right marking the forest boundary.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with mixed snow and grass

events.description: small red fox appears briefly on the left before running off
ground surface transitions from snow to grassy patches with remaining snow

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the winding path as it enters a forested area, with grass becoming visible beneath the snow

notable_agents.action: small red fox briefly visible near the tree line before disappearing

entered.detail: thick cluster of evergreen trees lining the right side of the path
trail showing exposed grass mixed with melting snow
large downed tree lying among the pines

segments.scene_description: The path enters a transitional forest zone where dense pines line the right side and the ground shifts from snow to grassy patches. A brief glimpse of wildlife appears on the left as the distant mountains become obscured by the rising terrain and trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense alpine forest trail with winding path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks deeper into the forest along the winding grassy trail, surrounded by dense pine trees

entered.detail: steep snow-dusted rock wall visible through the trees on the left

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt proceeding deeper into the dense alpine forest along a winding grassy path. The dense pines now flank both sides while a rocky mountain face becomes visible through the canopy on the left, and the snow-covered peaks are lost from view behind the forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt traverses a high alpine environment that transforms from a narrow mountain trail into a dense, sheltered forest. It begins with the character walking along a snowy path pressed against a steep rock wall, winding toward a prominent snow-covered peak. As Geralt descends leftward, the rocky cliff falls away to reveal an open valley vista with misty mountain ranges and clusters of pine trees marking the forest boundary. The scene then shifts into a transitional zone where the ground changes from snow to grassy patches and dense pines begin to line the path, partially obscuring the distant peaks. Finally, the camera follows Geralt deeper into the alpine forest along a winding grassy trail, where the canopy closes in and the snowy summits are completely lost from view behind the towering trees.
